understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get any pushable object, such as the selected piece or a block, to reach or exceed the specified target x-coordinate on the grid, winning the scenario by doing so before exhausting the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by one step (3 pixels) in the chosen direction; pushing occurs if a pushable object is adjacent, moving it along with the selected piece; walls can block movement or pushes, with their behavior potentially varying based on whether they are encountered directly or through an object being pushed against them.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | The selected piece is at x=0, and the target is x=6, so moving right will increase its x-position towards the goal.
